a_image.alt: Witchcore style mood board — Aesthetic · Mystical & Dark

sections.a_description: Deep forest darkness, amber candlelight, and the ancient botanical wisdom of herbs, crystals, and handwritten grimoires — Witchcore brings the mystical aesthetic of green witchcraft to digital spaces. The dark forest backgrounds and golden amber accents create an atmosphere of ritual and reverence, where every serif curve echoes the calligraphic flourishes of centuries-old plant illustrations.

This mystical style powers herbal apothecary shops, crystal healing stores, tarot reading platforms, and pagan community sites. You'll see it on artisanal candle makers, botanical skincare brands, astrology app landing pages, and witchcraft supply stores — anywhere that the visual language needs to evoke moon phases, dried lavender bundles, and the warm glow of altar candles in a darkened room.

The mystical, herb-scented aesthetic of witchcore — deep forest greens, candlelit ambers, and the ancient wisdom of botanical magic translated into digital form. Background: deep forest green-black (#0e1510). The .inner panel has a dark green-tinted background (#151d18) with a 1px border (#2a3a2e) — like looking into a dark forest. Colors: amber gold (#c9a84c) as the primary accent — the color of candlelight, honey, and ancient gold. Pale sage (#b8c4a8) for headings, muted olive (#7a8a6e) for body text. The aesthetic is mystical and botanical — dried herbs, crystal collections, leather-bound grimoires, and the flickering light of beeswax candles. Set in Cormorant — an elegant serif with calligraphic qualities that evoke handwritten spellbooks and botanical illustrations. Heading at weight 600, 26px, line-height 1.3, color #b8c4a8. Eyebrow at weight 300, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #c9a84c. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #7a8a6e. Buttons: primary — amber (#c9a84c), dark text (#0e1510), 4px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, amber border. Alternatives: EB Garamond (mystical serif), Spectral (elegant reading).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
